name: Targi
description: Targi is Andreas Steiger's tightly-engineered two-player desert worker-placement set among the Tuareg of the Sahara — players place tribesman tokens on the outer-frame border-cards of a 4x4 card grid, and the inner cell where the two placements intersect grants the resource or character. Trade dates, salt, and pepper for tribe cards that build toward victory. Compact, almost abstract, and one of the cleanest two-player euros ever designed.
